data_schema: train.csv: id(jpg filename), has_cactus(0/1 target). Images are 32x32 RGB .jpg files located DIRECTLY under <data-dir>/train/<id> and <data-dir>/test/<id>. sample_submission: id,has_cactus (predicted probability in [0,1]).
extra_notes: IMAGE binary classification. 32x32 RGB aerial photos, predict probability of a cactus. Use torch + torchvision on CUDA. A small CNN (2-3 conv blocks) or resnet18 trained a few epochs is plenty. Metric = ROC AUC (higher is better); CV_SCORE = OOF/validation ROC AUC. submission.csv columns: id,has_cactus (probabilities). Keep to a few epochs and a reasonable batch size so it finishes in a few minutes on the A40.
